description_long: This house features a striking modernist design with clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, with one section slightly offset and elevated above the other, creating a dynamic visual interplay. Large, flat surfaces are punctuated by minimalistic windows, including a vertical strip window and broad horizontal openings, allowing for ample natural light. A prominent external staircase leads to an upper terrace, which is partially covered by a series of parallel beams, adding architectural interest and shade. The lower level includes a recessed area with a pool or water feature, visible from multiple angles. The overall aesthetic is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing open space and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, minimalist house with clean lines, flat roofs, large windows, and an external staircase leading to a partially covered terrace. The design features a white facade, geometric forms, and a lower-level water feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights the tall vertical window and the solid, block-like massing of the house, with minimal fenestration on this side.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing the main entry area, a large horizontal window, and the water feature beneath the overhang, as well as the start of the external staircase.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the external staircase, the open terrace with parallel beams, and the interplay of the two main volumes, with visible open spaces and windows.
description_view_3: The rear or side view reveals the terrace area covered by parallel beams and the solid mass of the upper volume, with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with steps, no porch, and a flat overhang; clean lines and no decorative elements.
